name: ✪☆ Dandy’s School ☆✪
description:
Dandys school! 

Every toon besides Toodles, Coal, Pebble, and Gourdy are in this bot. Squirm is also not added yet as well.

UPDATE  - Tbh i did NOT expect this bot to get so popular. ty for chatting! Didn’t change the bot at all just changed the description. I’m considering making a remake but idk if I will. have fun with the bot tho and have a great day!
